scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @workspace/api-server && npm run build -w @workspace/voice-agent
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck -w @workspace/api-server && npm run typecheck -w @workspace/voice-agent
